title: Footprint Particles
body:
# 🚶Footprint Particles🚶

### - This Datapack is Smithed Compatible!

## About

This data pack is a simple quality of life pack that adds footprint particles to the game, with a config to control performance and preferences.
Now, when mobs and players walk around, they will leave behind footprints on soft materials such as dirt, wool, sand, etc.
These footprints disappear after a amount of time that can be configured to avoid tps lag.

Players will not leave these footprints if they are sneaking


![Footprints](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iXruOT6m/images/aab65837712b79182b9eda1adb04958e39f85883.png)


### ⌨️Config

Config options can be edited by using the scoreboard command to edit specific values
Example: (scoreboard players set *mobs footprints.config 1)

| Name             | Values               |  Use           |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Lifetime            | Any Integer Value              | Time in ticks it takes for a footstep to disappear             |
| Limit                  | And Integer Value              | How many footstep particles can exist in the world at one time             |
| Mobs                | 0 - 1 (True=1,False=0)              | Whether any mob can leave footsteps or only players             |

**Examples**

scoreboard players set *lifetime footprints.config 20 - Makes every footprint only exist for one second

scoreboard players set *limit footprints.config 100 - Makes it so only 100 footprints can exist at one time

scoreboard players set *mobs footprints.config 1 - Makes it so any *reasonable* mob can leave footsteps 



### 🖊️Credits

Programming/Modeling - HAK0TA538

Footprint Texture - Mojang (Lol)
